entities.name: CEREALS

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INNOVATIONS
entities.description: New methods, practices, or technologies introduced in agriculture and natural resource management

entities.name: GENDER NORMS
entities.description: Societal expectations and rules regarding the roles of men and women

entities.name: AGENCY

entities.name: SOCIOCULTURAL STRUCTURES
entities.description: The organized patterns of social relationships and cultural values

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD DYNAMICS
entities.description: The interactions and power relations within a family unit

relationships.description: Innovations are applied to the farming of legumes
Innovations are applied to the farming of cereals
Innovations are implemented within dryland farming systems
Gender norms influence the perception and adoption of agricultural innovations
Agency affects the capacity of individuals to utilize agricultural innovations
Sociocultural structures shape the ability of individuals to innovate
Household dynamics influence the negotiation for resources needed to innovate
Sociocultural structures define and maintain gender norms
Household dynamics are influenced by prevailing gender norms
